description: regexp.MustCompile() is called inside slugify()/slugifyCreate() on every invocation. Should be moved to package-level vars to avoid recompilation overhead on each call.
title: Move regex compilation to package-level vars

description: ai/usage.go:77-79 prints warnings while holding the lock via color.Printf(). Could block the spinner goroutine if stderr is slow. Should accumulate warnings and print after unlock.
title: Move Printf out of mutex in usage tracking
Clean up raw ANSI escape sequences
description: Replace raw ANSI escapes in utils/color.go with lipgloss equivalents: HighlightMatches (bold red via raw \033[1;31m), ClearLine/ClearLinesUp are terminal control not styling — keep as raw ANSI. HighlightMatches should use lipgloss with forced color output for non-TTY contexts like fzf preview.

title: Remove fatih/color dependency
description: After all migration is complete: remove fatih/color import from utils/color.go and ai/usage.go, run go mod tidy to clean the dep from go.mod. Verify no remaining references.

title: Migrate utils/color.go from fatih/color to lipgloss
description: Replace all 8 color variable definitions (Dim, BoldCyan, Bold, Underline, Green, BoldGreen, Red, DimCyan) with lipgloss.Style equivalents. Update Dimf() helper. The SprintFunc/Fprintf patterns need to become lipgloss Render() calls. Keep the same exported API names so callers dont break.

ai/tools.go uses filepath.Join(notesDir, f) where f comes from AI tool calls. A crafted filename like ../../../etc/passwd could escape the notes directory. Need to add filepath.Clean() and verify the resolved path stays within notesDir.
title: Fix path traversal vulnerability in AI tool handlers
Migrate ai/usage.go local color instances to lipgloss
description: ai/usage.go has 2 local fatih/color instances (line 97 and 124: dim := color.New(color.Faint)). Replace with lipgloss styles or reuse the shared Dim style from utils/color.go.

title: Update frame.go to use lipgloss styles
description: frame.go uses Dim.SprintFunc(), BoldGreen.SprintFunc(), DimCyan.SprintFunc(). After color.go migration, update these call sites to use the new lipgloss-based API.
config.go ignores errors from os.UserHomeDir() and os.MkdirAll(). If the home dir can't be determined, everything downstream silently breaks with confusing symptoms.
title: Propagate config path errors instead of swallowing

description: os.Getenv('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY') is called in 4+ places with inconsistent validation. Some check for empty, some don't. Should extract to a single helper that validates once and returns a clear error.
title: Extract API key retrieval into single helper function
Optimize commands for AI-agent usage
description: Make nora's one-shot commands (add, import, tags add --ai, fix, etc.) work well when called by AI agents like Claude Code. This means: clean machine-readable output (JSON mode or structured text), non-interactive fallbacks (skip fzf prompts when stdin isn't a TTY), clear exit codes, and potentially a --json flag for structured output. The goal is that an AI agent can shell out to nora commands as tools — e.g. claude-code could run 'nora add' to format and save a note, 'nora search' to find notes, 'nora tags' to manage taxonomy, all without human interaction.
utils/notes.go, utils/tags.go, and utils/pick.go each parse frontmatter with slightly different logic. Risk of inconsistent behavior. Should have one canonical parser in utils used everywhere.
title: Unify frontmatter parsing into single canonical parser
Migrate setup wizard to huh form
description: Replace sequential bufio.NewReader prompts in cmd/setup.go with huh.NewForm: huh.NewInput for notes directory path, conditional huh.NewConfirm for directory creation.

title: Migrate simple Y/N confirmations to huh
description: 6 sites across 5 files use bufio.NewReader or fmt.Scanln for y/N confirmation. Create utils/confirm.go with Confirm(title string) bool wrapping huh.NewConfirm(). Replace: cmd/add.go:117, cmd/delete.go:72, cmd/import.go:227, cmd/fix.go:61+137, cmd/tags.go:84.

SaveMemories() in session.go makes two API calls (extract + consolidate). If the first succeeds but the second fails, you get partial/duplicate memories with no recovery path. Need better error handling and rollback.
title: Make SaveMemories resilient to partial API failures

description: slugify(), generateFilename(), extractTitle(), and stripCodeFences() each have near-identical copies in both cmd/add.go and ai/tools.go. Should be extracted to a shared package to avoid drift and reduce maintenance.
title: Consolidate duplicate functions across cmd/add.go and ai/tools.go

description: tools.go:301-314 budget capping logic can still attempt a read with 0 remaining if budget.Total is 1. The order of operations in the cap/maxPerRead calculation is fragile.
title: Fix budget math edge case when Total is 1

description: cmd/root.go has a large flag-checking block (L40-69) that mixes shortcut flags with normal command flow. Could be cleaner as subcommands or a dispatch table.
title: Refactor root command flag soup into cleaner pattern

description: Investigate adding support for encrypted directories that can be locked/unlocked. Notes in these directories would be encrypted at rest and require authentication to access. Explore encryption approaches (age, GPG, libsodium), key management UX, and how this integrates with the flat-file markdown philosophy. Consider: per-directory encryption, seamless decrypt-on-read/encrypt-on-write, what happens with search/tags across encrypted boundaries, and CLI ergonomics (e.g. nora unlock, nora lock).
title: Explore locked/encrypted directories
Add bordered chrome to note display
description:
Add a reusable box-drawing frame for displaying notes in the terminal. Design decisions:

**Style**: Rounded box (╭╮╰╯│─├┤) wrapping content
**Header chrome**: Filename in top bar, date + tags on second row (tags in dim cyan), separated from body by ├──┤
**Scope**: Start with nora show, then expand to ask, search, manage
**Architecture**: Reusable renderer in utils/ that takes content + metadata and returns framed output. Style should be swappable later (e.g. sharp corners, minimal, etc.)
**Behavior**: Borders only when stdout is TTY (plain output when piped). Respects terminal width.

Layout:
╭─ filename.md ──────────────────────╮
│  2025-10-23  tag1, tag2, tag3      │
├────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                    │
│  (glamour-rendered markdown body)  │
│                                    │
╰────────────────────────────────────╯

Implementation:
- New utils/frame.go with Frame struct and Render method
- Frame style as a struct (corner chars, line chars) for future style variants
- Parse frontmatter for date/tags to populate chrome
- Update utils.Show() to use framed output
- Later: integrate into ask (tool reads), search (result snippets), manage
apilog.go file grows unbounded with no rotation or size limits. Should implement basic rotation or max file size to prevent disk usage issues in long-running sessions.
title: Add log rotation for API debug log

description: At least 8+ spots silently discard errors: utils/pick.go:34 (os.ReadFile), ai/session.go:507 (os.WriteFile for memories), config/config.go:74 (os.UserHomeDir), cmd/add.go:120 (reader.ReadString). These cause silent data loss or confusing failures.
title: Fix unchecked errors throughout codebase
Add charmbracelet/huh dependency
description: go get github.com/charmbracelet/huh. Verify it resolves cleanly with existing go.mod deps (lipgloss, glamour already present). bubbletea will be a new transitive dep.

title: Pretty print nora search with ripgrep colors
description: Enable ripgrep's built-in ANSI color output for nora search (both content and tag searches). Add color bool param to SearchNotes() to keep AI tool calls plain.
